title: [codereview] coap_dtn.c: deaddrop_post hardcoded decrypted[256] and opt_buf sizes risk overflow; no validation of decrypted_len
description: Fixed sizes may not match CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE_PLAINTEXT_MAX or request. PIV and options not used after unprotect. Should use proper constants and bounds checking. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Updated to CONFIG_LICHEN_OSCORE_PLAINTEXT_MAX and larger opt_buf; added validation paths in unprotect. Fixed in edit after codereview
